nodes.label: AI as ideation partner
nodes.grounding_span: I treated the model as a research collaborator, going back and forth

nodes.label: Thorough verification of AI outputs
nodes.label_negative: Unverifiable AI outputs leading to hallucinations
nodes.grounding_span: I try to only use it in ways I can verify on my own, so I don't fall prey to hallucinations

nodes.label: Active engagement with work
nodes.label_negative: Being at a remove from work
nodes.grounding_span: it would put me at a remove from the work

nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: It's never quite what I want, perhaps because it's difficult to articulate exactly what I'm looking for

nodes.label: AI reliability for grading and assessment
nodes.grounding_span: I'll happily delegate that work (with supervision, always) to an AI if it did a good enough job

nodes.label: Professional growth and skill maintenance
nodes.grounding_span: I need to keep growing my skills

nodes.label: Productivity and efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: It was productive and sped up the process

nodes.label: Ownership and understanding of work
nodes.grounding_span: I felt that I didn't have a feel for the schedule and I was uncomfortable

nodes.label: Creative control in assessment
nodes.grounding_span: I have to noodle around with the concepts and data for a while before a good idea floats to the surface

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: The help the model gave me with using R for my research was highly satisfying

nodes.label: Frustration with AI for problem generation
nodes.grounding_span: I'm less pleased in situations where I've asked it to come up with assessment problems

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI for complex tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I don't really use AI on a regular or daily basis

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's inability to reconsider grading
nodes.grounding_span: I hope that the AI grading helpers that are being developed get truly good at some point

nodes.label: Verification-oriented — cross-checks AI outputs against other sources
nodes.grounding_span: I verified what it told me either through my own knowledge or from external sources

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth collaboration
nodes.grounding_span: I challenged it when I thought it was wrong or unclear, or when a command didn't work
